records.m_Talk_ENG: I-is it over? I really thought I was done for this time.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I-is it over? I really thought I was done for this time.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I-is it over? I really thought I was done for this time.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Wait. The Corruption ray detector is still reacting.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Wait. The Corruption ray detector is still reacting.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Wait. The Corruption ray detector is still reacting.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Is there a C.O. hanging from the ceiling?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Is there a C.O. hanging from the ceiling?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Is there a C.O. hanging from the ceiling?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I think it's looking for something.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I think it's looking for something.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I think it's looking for something.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yikes, look at those gnarly teeth. One bite and you're Swiss cheese.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yikes, look at those gnarly teeth. One bite and you're Swiss cheese.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yikes, look at those gnarly teeth. One bite and you're Swiss cheese.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I've never seen a large C.O. like that before.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I've never seen a large C.O. like that before.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I've never seen a large C.O. like that before.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's not just a large C.O. This detector is set to only respond to a Category 4 or higher.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's not just a large C.O. This detector is set to only respond to a Category 4 or higher.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's not just a large C.O. This detector is set to only respond to a Category 4 or higher.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Not even a Category 2... but a Category 4?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Not even a Category 2... but a Category 4?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Not even a Category 2... but a Category 4?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Is that thing why no one's been able to make it back alive from here?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Is that thing why no one's been able to make it back alive from here?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Is that thing why no one's been able to make it back alive from here?

records.m_Talk_ENG:
It spotted us! It
8ks coming this way!
records.m_Talk_DEU:
It spotted us! It
8ks coming this way!
records.m_Talk_FRA:
It spotted us! It
8ks coming this way!

records.m_Talk_ENG: It'll take more than a Counter to defeat that thing!
records.m_Talk_DEU: It'll take more than a Counter to defeat that thing!
records.m_Talk_FRA: It'll take more than a Counter to defeat that thing!
